generated.quote: Yesterday is gone. Tomorrow has not yet come. We have only today. Let us begin.
generated.author: Mother Teresa

generated.quote: Some of us think holding on makes us strong, but sometimes it is letting go.
generated.author: Hermann Hesse

generated.quote: Start where you are. Use what you have. Do what you can.
generated.author: Arthur Ashe

generated.quote: The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.
generated.author: Lao Tzu

generated.quote: Vulnerability is not winning or losing; it's having the courage to show up and be seen when we have no control over the outcome.
generated.author: Brené Brown

generated.quote: It is not what happens to you, but how you react to it that matters.
generated.author: Epictetus

generated.quote: Peace comes from within. Do not seek it without.
generated.author: Buddha

generated.quote: Have no fear of perfection - you'll never reach it.
generated.author: Salvador Dalí
